prompt:
Pharmaceutical vial product photography, vertical 4:5 portrait composition. TWO REFERENCE IMAGES are provided. The FIRST reference is the LABEL / TYPOGRAPHY / CAP ANCHOR — a 3ml clear-glass BPC-157 baseline showing the locked label layout, typography hierarchy, navy cap (hex #101850), bottom accent bar, lighting, and shadow style. Reproduce the label content, typeface, alignment, sizing, hairline, and bar EXACTLY from this first reference. The SECOND reference is the VIAL GLASS ANCHOR — an empty amber-tinted dark-brown 3ml glass vial. Reproduce the vial's amber/dark-brown tinted glass color, geometry, and proportions EXACTLY from this second reference, including its short tubular shape and crimp neck — the vial must be the same compact 3ml size and silhouette as in the second reference, NOT taller or chunkier. Cap color must remain EXACTLY hex #101850 navy. Vial size: 3ml dark amber glass.

The label has the following content laid out top to bottom (exactly matching the first reference): (1) Upper roughly 60 percent of the label is a blank pristine white logo zone with absolutely no graphics, text, lines, or marks of any kind. LOCKED TYPEFACE FOR ALL TEXT: Helvetica Neue (or visually identical clean geometric medical sans-serif). (2) Below the logo zone, the product name 'BPC-157' rendered in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD (~700) in dark charcoal grey, perfectly horizontally centered, natural letter proportions. (3) Directly below the product name with tight spacing, the dose-and-volume line 'xx mg · 3 ml' rendered in HELVETICA NEUE BOLD (same bold weight) at roughly 60 percent of the product-name size, charcoal grey, centered, with a single middle-dot separator. The 'xx' must be rendered LITERALLY as two lowercase letter x characters — intentional placeholder, not a number. (4) Below the dose with a small visual gap, two stacked compliance lines in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT (~300, NOT bold), all-caps, medium grey, ~22 percent of the product-name size, tight line spacing. Line 1: 'FOR RESEARCH USE ONLY'. Line 2: 'NOT FOR HUMAN CONSUMPTION'. Both centered, equal in size and weight. (5) Below the second compliance line with a small gap, the lot line 'LOT: NH-1024' in HELVETICA NEUE LIGHT (NOT bold), same small size, medium grey, single line, perfectly horizontally centered with equal left and right margins.

(6) BAR — At the very bottom edge of the label, the slim solid navy accent bar at exactly hex #101850 must run UNINTERRUPTED EDGE-TO-EDGE across the FULL WIDTH of the label, from the absolute leftmost edge to the absolute rightmost edge of the label, with NO gap, NO truncation, NO fade-out, NO white space at either end. The bar must reach BOTH the left and right edges of the label completely — it should appear to wrap fully around the visible front face of the vial. Match the first reference's hairline (if any) above the bar exactly.

ABSOLUTELY NO additional hairlines, NO horizontal rules above or below the text. Sharp focus, high resolution, premium pharmaceutical product shot, clinical minimalist aesthetic. CRITICAL: render every text string exactly as written including the literal 'xx mg · 3 ml' with two lowercase x's; do NOT replace 'xx' with a number.
